title: The "Position Drift" Problem: Why LLMs cower under user pressure
excerpt: I built a pipeline to measure how easily state-of-the-art models abandon correct answers when a user insists they are wrong. Here is what I found about the fragility of LLM reasoning.

title: AST Static Analysis + LLM Semantic Checks
excerpt: Using AST trees to provide context to LLMs for deeper, more meaningful commit analysis.

title: Zero-Knowledge Pastes: AES-256-GCM
excerpt: How to build an infrastructure where the server literally cannot read the data it serves.

title: oklch in production: one year later
excerpt: Swapping hex for oklch wasn't a theoretical exercise, it fixed three real problems.

title: Clip-path is underused
excerpt: Forget border-radius. Clip-path gives you GPU-composited shape masking.
